mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, role, lock_until, login_fail_count, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{lockUntil}, #{loginFailCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, lock_until = #{lockUntil}, login_fail_count = #{loginFailCount}, exercise_days = #{exerciseDays}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET login_fail_count = #{failCount}, lock_until = #{lockUntil}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, role, create_time FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0
